nodes.label: AI as collaborative brainstorming partner for student diagnostics
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable initial analyzer requiring correction
nodes.grounding_span: it helps me come up with some different ways of explaining or different methods of practice

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool for content creation
nodes.label_negative: Manual content creation consuming excessive time
nodes.grounding_span: it generates the slides I want which saves me a massive amount of time

nodes.label: AI use for personalized student instruction
nodes.label_negative: Inability to provide individualized support due to time constraints
nodes.grounding_span: it has helped me differentiate more and provide the students who need extra support with more support

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI handling parent feedback autonomously without personal touch
nodes.grounding_span: that is more a collaborative writing session as it is too personal for it to do on its own

nodes.label: AI as debugging assistant
nodes.grounding_span: if I forgot to tell it that the student is ESL then it may come up with a reason for the disconnect that is far more general

nodes.label: AI as metaphor generator for abstract concepts
nodes.label_negative: Inability to find effective teaching metaphors
nodes.grounding_span: The AI really helped me frame it in very concrete terms of knowing two different languages

nodes.label: Teacher direct engagement with student writing
nodes.label_negative: AI-mediated grading and feedback on student writing
nodes.grounding_span: I do not let AI grade or provide student feedback on writing

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as autonomous task completer without human collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: I never just give it something to do. It is a constant back and forth collaboration

nodes.label: Student progress and learning
nodes.grounding_span: it really clicked with the student

nodes.label: Personal connection with students
nodes.grounding_span: I would lose such a rich part of our relationships

nodes.label: Professional efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: saves me a massive amount of time

nodes.label: Equitable and individualized instruction
nodes.grounding_span: differentiate more and provide the students who need extra support with more support

nodes.label: Teacher professional growth
nodes.grounding_span: help me think even deeper and provide even more insightful analysis

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI diagnostic help
nodes.grounding_span: it really clicked with the student

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's inability to maintain context
nodes.grounding_span: it may come up with a reason for the disconnect that is far more general

nodes.label: Positive expectation for student AI writing use
nodes.grounding_span: I do not let AI grade or provide student feedback on writing

nodes.label: Optimistic anticipation of deeper collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: I think it will continue to evolve and help me think even deeper

nodes.label: Iterative diagnostic refinement through context provision
nodes.grounding_span: if I go 'that doesn't sound quite right here because he is paying attention and is engaged, but English IS his second language' then it will take that information and make a more specific and often more accurate answer

nodes.label: Proactive specification and memory utilization
nodes.grounding_span: I have learned to be proactive in my requests by being very specific about what I want and don't want and what I am trying to achieve
